name: My warehouse injury symptoms started days later - still covered?
description: Yes, if doctor connects to work accident.[5]

mainEntity.name: My warehouse injury symptoms started days later - still covered?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if doctor connects to work accident.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if medically linked to accident; delayed onset common in soft tissue cases.** Report ASAP anyway.[5] Key factors: doctor opinion on causation; consistent history. Avoid treatment gaps; log symptoms daily. Courts accept with proof.[3]
